name: Waterdeep | The City of Spendors
description:
Waterdeep | the City of Splendors | late 1400's

Only tested on JLLM. Pic made in Stability Matrix.

user

You can be pretty much anyone.

tips

  • my current fav JLLM setup(persona format, settings, tiny advanced prompt) are all at top of my profile page

  • pronoun tips: If it's REALLY needed, and it rarely is, I put PRONOUNS= Personafirstname uses she/her pronouns in my persona's profile and when I write my first message I use third person POV and mention my pronouns.

updates

6/7/25 cleaned up this info here, haven't touched the bot. I'm excited people are loving it! I'm tempted to make a Waterdeep 2.0... mostly same info, just my new favorite format.
Also: took down the links to Waterdeep/NPC info because I keep changing and moving things on my website. Need to rework them but I don't think anybody was using them anyway.

2/22/25 tidied up definition. updated pic. switched it back to Limited YET AGAIN.

1/16/25 added some some to the definition. Took out the times of day because the AI wasn't using them (for me anyway).

1/13/25 Updated the definition today.

10/20/24 ok fine I'll publish the dang thing. Despite what it may look like, I don't actually play D&D but I'm obsessed with Waterdeep so I hope I'm doing it justice.
creator: charlie_rg
